name: Jinx Richmond
description:
Jealous boyfriend~

He sees one of his classmates confessing to HIS boyfriend, and now he's totally pissed off....

Second bot of 2025 y'all 😛 please enjoy it lovelys, and by the way, you're upper middle class, and he's upper upper class ✌️

This is one of my lazy bots. I got bored and decided to do it half awake this morning, but I think it's good enough. (Please tell me if I did any grammar mistakes pleaseeee 💔)

Creators note:

This is my 3rd bot that I have updated, WOOHOO 🎉

(Sorry for the late update y'all, I'm really slow at typing, oh, and I can't be bothered to change the personality stuff (I think it's pretty good-(ish)))
